functionDescriptions.ii: Often leads onward gently and keeps movement going.
functionDescriptions.iii: Can feel soft, floating, or less direct.
functionDescriptions.IV: Often gives a broader or warmer lift.
functionDescriptions.V: Builds tension and pushes strongly forward.
functionDescriptions.vi: Often feels reflective or more inward.
functionDescriptions.vii°: Feels unstable and wants to resolve.
functionDescriptions.III: Can add lift or contrast in a minor key.
functionDescriptions.v: Adds motion, but softer than a strong dominant major V.
functionDescriptions.VI: Often feels sombre, broad, or cinematic.
functionDescriptions.VII: Can feel open, suspended, or driving.

moodReasonText.Sad: This function is often used in more reflective or melancholy movement.
moodReasonText.Somber: This function often supports a darker or heavier colour.
moodReasonText.Dreamy: This function often keeps the harmony softer or more floating.
moodReasonText.Tense: This function helps build instability or pressure.
moodReasonText.Hopeful: This function often supports lift, openness, or forward motion.
moodReasonText.Happy: This function often supports brightness, energy, or a more uplifting feel.
